notes.en: [[weapon:elegy-for-the-end|Elegy]] offers a helpful [[stat:er|ER]] substat alongside an [[stat:em]] and [[stat:atk%]] buff for your teammates. While not directly useful in teams centered around [[character:noelle]] or [[character:arataki-itto]], this could possibly be a good choice for future [[element:geo]] DPS characters, or in a team which utilizes [[element:geo]] Resonance.
